summary: A graphic sequence ('GLOBAL ENTRY Machines' and 'CBP STREAMLINES TRAVEL') using stock photos of airport Global Entry kiosks inside colorful frames branded with FIFA World Cup 2026 and CBP. There is no audio.
notable_text: GLOBAL ENTRY Machines; CBP STREAMLINES TRAVEL; Global Entry Mobile App; FIFA WORLD CUP 2026; tweet: 'Want to clear customs quicker than a corner kick? Get Global Entry!'
